title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
description: Verify that a user can successfully create an account by providing a unique email and a password of at least 8 characters.

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the email already exists in the system, enforcing the unique email business rule.

title: Account creation with password less than 8 characters is rejected
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is shorter than 8 characters, enforcing the minimum password length rule.

title: Email uniqueness validation before account creation
description: Verify that the system checks for email uniqueness before proceeding with account creation, preventing duplicate accounts.

title: Password length validation for minimum 8 characters
description: Verify that the system validates the password length and rejects passwords shorter than 8 characters during account creation.

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters
description: Verify that account creation succeeds when the password is exactly 8 characters long, testing the lower boundary of the password length rule.

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters
description: Verify that account creation fails when the password is 7 characters long, testing just below the minimum boundary.

title: Account creation with password of 9 characters
description: Verify that account creation succeeds when the password is 9 characters long, testing just above the minimum boundary.

title: Concurrent registration attempts with the same email
description: Verify that when multiple concurrent registration requests are made with the same email, only one account is created and the rest are rejected, preventing race conditions in email uniqueness check.
